prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约 2142→2320→2422→1703→1575，2024 年起位次明显前移，2025 年基准约 1575 名，近两年累计前移约 847 名，竞争持续加剧；该校在黑龙江省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021 年 43 人、2022 年 43 人、2023 年 48 人、2024 年 50 人、2025 年 50 人；2026 年计划 50 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年约第 28–33 名（2026 年第 33 名），稳居全国顶尖理工类院校前列；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及个别师德师风事件，对整体报考热度影响有限；抖音热度排名第 33（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022 年曾因断档现象成为考生关注黑马，近年无明显投档异常记录；电子科学与技术 A+、信息与通信工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、仪器科学与技术 A-、光学工程 A-、管理科学与工程 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科，在电子信息领域具有顶尖学科实力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、计算机类、电气工程等核心专业在 2024–2026 年均为高热推荐，社会报考热度持续走高；黑龙江省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 167000，较 2025 年（物理类 117407+历史类 54707=172114）略有减少，物理类估算约 113560 人，考生规模小幅下降可缓解部分竞争压力；电子科技大学位于四川成都，非本省高校，对本省考生无显著地域偏好加成；该校 在黑龙江省招生计划占比较小（约 2%–3%），跨省报考属正常竞争格局。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次前移趋势、核心专业持续高热、2026 年招生计划持平及本省考生小幅减少等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 1575 名基础上略有后移，主要受专业热度驱动竞争加剧影响，考生规模下降仅部分对冲；预测最低位次约 1595 名，区间 1356–1834 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信）
- 计算机类
- 工科试验班（电子工程类）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程（沙河校区）（AI交叉创新人才培养实验班）
- 自动化（AI交叉复合型创新人才双学位培养计划）
- 工科试验班（机器人、电气信息、智能制造）
- 电子信息类（光电集成与光网络）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 1356–1834 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档王牌专业（电子信息类、计算机类）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<1356 名）可重点冲击一档；位次接近区间上限（>1834 名）应以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 2142→2320→2422→1703→1575. Since 2024, rankings have significantly moved forward, with a baseline of about 1575 in 2025, and a cumulative forward shift of about 847 places over the past two years, indicating intensifying competition. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for Physics Category (including Science) was: 43 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 50 in 2024, 50 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 50, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; in recent years, its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been around 28–33 (33rd in 2026), firmly among the top national science and engineering institutions. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving individual teacher ethics incidents, which have limited impact on overall application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 33 (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In 2022, it became a dark horse due to a gap phenomenon, with no obvious abnormal admission records in recent years. It has A+ in Electronic Science and Technology, A+ in Information and Communication Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A- in Instrument Science and Technology, A- in Optical Engineering, A- in Management Science and Engineering, totaling 6 A- and above disciplines, demonstrating top-tier strength in the electronic information field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with continuously rising social application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, slightly lower than 2025 (Physics Category 117,407 + History Category 54,707 = 172,114), with Physics Category estimated at about 113,560. The slight decrease in candidate scale can partially alleviate competition pressure. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university, so it has no significant regional preference advantage for local candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Province accounts for a small proportion (about 2%–3%), and cross-province application is a normal competitive pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of rankings in the past two years, the continued high popularity of core majors, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the slight decrease in local candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move backward from the 2025 baseline of 1575, mainly due to intensified competition driven by major popularity, with the decrease in candidate scale only partially offsetting. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1595, with a range of 1356–1834.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information (Information and Communication)
- Computer Science
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Software Engineering (Shahe Campus) (AI Cross-Innovation Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Automation (AI Cross-Composite Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Electronic Information (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Networks).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biomedical Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (New Materials, New Energy, and Electronic Chemistry)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information and Earth Science Composite Training)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1356–1834, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Electronic Information, Computer Science) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1356), you can focus on Tier 1; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>1834), you should mainly choose Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 社会科学试验班（数智公共治理）（含行政管理、城市管理、法学）
- 外国语言文学类（AI交叉复合型创新人才双学位培养计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 该校在黑龙江省历史类仅设 2 个招生专业，位次在预测区间 858–1162 名内均可报考。社会科学试验班历年录取位次优于外国语言文学类，建议位次靠前考生优先选择社会科学试验班；位次接近区间上限可考虑外国语言文学类作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1044→968→893→907→1025, showing a fluctuating trend. The lowest was in 2023 (893), and it rebounded to 1025 in 2025, with rankings moving back by about 118 places in the last two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was 8 students in 2021–2022, 4 students in 2023–2025, and 4 students in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 33rd in the Soft Science main ranking, known for its strengths in science and engineering, with liberal arts majors not being its core advantage. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly related to science and engineering events, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions. Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with moderate overall attention. All A- and above disciplines are in engineering, and the History Category enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature) lack corresponding A-class discipline support, making disciplinary appeal average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Public Administration) corresponds to the Law major category, which is in a state of divergence and wait-and-see; the Foreign Languages and Literature category corresponds to the Foreign Language major category, which is generally wait-and-see; both are not high-heat majors. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is about 53,440, a slight decrease from 54,707 in 2025, easing competition slightly. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university, so it has no significant regional preference advantage for local liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of ranking decline in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan, average popularity of liberal arts majors, and a slight decrease in local examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly improve from the 2025 baseline of 1025, mainly due to eased competition from the decrease in examinee numbers. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1010, with a range of 858–1162.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Public Governance) (including Public Administration, Urban Management, Law)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (AI Cross-disciplinary Composite Innovative Talent Dual Degree Training Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: This university only offers 2 enrollment majors in History Category in Heilongjiang Province, and rankings within the predicted range of 858–1162 are all eligible for application. The Social Science Experimental Class has historically had better admission rankings than the Foreign Languages and Literature category. It is recommended that examinees with higher rankings prioritize the Social Science Experimental Class; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range may consider the Foreign Languages and Literature category as a safe choice.
